nodes.label: Assess product fit and disclosure burden
nodes.summary: Ensure the selected product is appropriate for the target segment and that core cautions are evidenced.

nodes.label: Evidence segregation and delegated-custody boundaries
nodes.summary: Show who controls assets, where they sit, and how client and house assets are separated.

nodes.label: Apply transfer screening and Travel Rule checks
nodes.summary: Ensure outbound and inbound transfer workflows include screening and data-sharing controls when required.

nodes.label: Verify investor eligibility and class restrictions
nodes.summary: Prevent subscriptions and transfers that violate class, jurisdiction, or target-investor limits.

nodes.label: Govern NAV, pricing, and stale-data handling
nodes.summary: Ensure mint, burn, fee, and reporting flows depend on an explicit pricing and stale-data policy.

nodes.label: Reconcile on-chain and off-chain records
nodes.summary: Maintain a defined source-of-truth policy and mismatch escalation for tokenized workflows.

nodes.label: Govern coupons, record dates, and servicing exceptions
nodes.summary: Ensure lifecycle events such as coupons, calls, or maturity payments are aligned to records and investor communications.

nodes.label: Apply sanctions and counterparty screening
nodes.summary: Run and evidence sanctions, AML, and counterparty screens before sensitive transfers and settlements.

nodes.label: Map the legal wrapper and perimeter before launch
nodes.summary: Force explicit classification and launch-review checkpoints where product perimeter is uncertain.

nodes.label: Model prefunding, liquidity, and intraday limits
nodes.summary: Show how the chosen settlement asset and rail affect funding, limits, and failure handling.

nodes.label: Assess issuer, vendor, and venue concentration
nodes.summary: Make dependency concentration visible when a product depends heavily on one provider or rail.

nodes.label: Prepare incident communication and recovery playbooks
nodes.summary: Ensure key compromise, outage, sanctions alerts, and data mismatches have explicit response paths.

nodes.label: Evidence authority, succession, and recovery for complex holdings
nodes.summary: Support family-office and UHNW workflows with explicit governance and continuity controls.

nodes.label: Govern delegated operators and sub-custodians
nodes.summary: Define oversight, reporting, and fallback expectations for external operators.
